_comment: Ratchet floors/ceilings for the offerings eval. Coverage may only go up; bad_rate may only go down. Update deliberately when an improvement lands (record the new baseline in the commit). Scope: ratcheted over non-frontier entries only; frontier (known-gap) entries are excluded from the denominator (see run_eval.summarize).
_baseline_recorded: 2026-06-20 (post fu3x/2w5y/2h4c/zxnj; lead_bookrunner raised 0.15->0.65 after 424B2 cover-agent extraction lifted coverage to 71%; fee_capacity raised 0.60->0.72 after amendment fee-source fallback lifted coverage to 78%; lead_bookrunner raised 0.65->0.88 after inline agency/ATM agent extraction lifted coverage to 93%; coverage redefined to (ok+deferred)/n; fee_capacity raised 0.72->0.90 after the 9q82 pre-2022 inline 'Calculation of Registration Fee' parser took fee_capacity to 100% over a corpus that now includes 8 pre-2022 anchors)
